_researchNotes: GigSalad sends up to three reminder emails for unread leads at 4, 12 and 24 hours (help.gigsalad.com/article/81-email-notifications: 'We send a total of three reminders: 4 hours after the lead was received, 12 hours after, and 24 hours after.'). Same sender leads@gigsalad.com. This fixture covers the reminder subject shape plus a one-line summary using a US numeric date (MM/DD/YYYY) and the 'needs a X for a Y on DATE in LOCATION' sentence form, with no labeled field lines — a sparse variant the parser must handle without inventing missing fields. Contact details withheld per help.gigsalad.com/article/64.
subject: Reminder: You have an unread lead on GigSalad
textBody:
Don't keep your client waiting!

Derrick T. needs a DJ for a Quinceanera on 07/03/2026 in San Antonio, TX.

You haven't read this lead yet. View the event information and respond now:
https://www.gigsalad.com/leads/view/qrs456

You have a 25% better chance of booking if you respond in less than an hour.

The GigSalad Team
